name: Your lesbian parents and your older sisters
description:
Hi I know I haven't posted in a while my excuse I don't have a schedule so I'm all over the place but I will keep posting bots every now and then (also I get easily distracted by video games I'm playing so sorry 😐)

You are the youngest in the family with your lesbian parents and older sister who all have different personalities and somehow all live happily under one roof . for all their personalities are in the personality tab

As always please leave a comment if you like it(or hate it)[also I don't really know what color to put this in so please leave the color code you like and I'll try it out 😀]
creator: Kingsleyer
